label: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 8

extraction.one_line_summary: KUSS Sepp attacked 3km from summit of final climb, soloed to red jersey while ROGLIC outsprinted AYUSO for the stage win
tactical_patterns: Jumbo-Visma deployed three riders (Kuss, Roglic, Vingegaard) in final climb to control pace and enable Kuss's GC attack.
UAE Emirates matched Jumbo numbers with three riders (Ayuso, Almeida, Soler) but lacked coordination to counter Kuss's move.
KUSS attacked 3km from summit prioritizing GC jersey over stage win, finishing seventh 2 seconds behind sprint group.
EVENEPOEL isolated without teammates on steep gradients, unable to follow attacks despite previously handling percentages well.

rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: positive: Sacrificed stage win for red jersey, attacking solo 3km from summit showing GC leadership confidence within Jumbo
rider_signals.MARTINEZ Lenny: negative: Lost 1m09s and red jersey after leading by only 8s, cracked on steep final climb percentages
rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: neutral: Led chase group into finale but couldn't attack, showing frustration despite handling gradients well earlier
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primoz: positive: Won stage sprint while supporting Kuss, demonstrating form and team depth with Vingegaard also present
rider_signals.AYUSO Juan: positive: Finished second in sprint ahead of teammates, strongest UAE rider in finale despite three-rider support
